ddls:
CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the athlete */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the athlete (e.g., SO-2, JR-3) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the athlete belongs to */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the athlete */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Date of birth of the athlete */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the athlete */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the athlete */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major field of study of the athlete */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL or path to the athlete's profile picture */,
  "injured" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the athlete is currently injured */,
  "injury_details" TEXT /* Details about the athlete's injury, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "mascot" TEXT /* Team's mascot */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the team's official website */,
  "team_picture" TEXT /* URL or path to the team's picture */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Team's contact email */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Team's contact phone number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event (e.g., 100m Dash) */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., Track, Field) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance for track events */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the event */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group for the event */,
  "gender_restrictions" TEXT /* Gender restrictions for the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "competition_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competition */,
  "time" REAL /* Time taken by the athlete (in seconds) for track events */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score achieved by the athlete for field events */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed during the event */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the athlete in the event */,
  "personal_best" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if this result is the athlete's personal best */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the event */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_competition_results_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_competition_results_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_competition_results_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "competitions" (
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each competition */,
  "competition_name" TEXT /* Name of the competition */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the competition */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the competition */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the competition */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the competition */,
  "organizer" TEXT /* Name of the organization hosting the competition */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the competition's official website */,
  "entry_fee" REAL /* Entry fee for the competition */,
  "number_of_participants" INTEGER /* Number of participants in the competition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("competition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, athlete, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL or path to the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "athlete_performance_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance history entry */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competition result */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the performance */,
  "performance" TEXT /* Detailed performance metrics (e.g., time, score) */,
  "improvement" TEXT /* Notes on improvement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athlete_performance_history_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athlete_performance_history_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athlete_performance_history_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES competition_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event schedule */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competition */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event within the competition venue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_schedules_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_schedules_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach is associated with */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the coach started working with the team */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the coach ended working with the team */,
  "achievements" TEXT /* Achievements of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
